inputs.refiner_statement: Position report cargo 2207: 412,580.0 bbl at observed temperature, exchange contract EX-118.
inputs.counterparty_statement: Counterparty statement CP-9931: 414,000.5 bbl at 60F, exchange contract EX-118.

expectedOutput.explanation: The roughly 1,420 bbl variance is a temperature-basis mismatch: one statement is at observed temperature, the other at 60F. It recommends aligning both volumes to a common temperature basis, for human approval before posting.

evaluations.name: Demurrage charge on one side only

inputs.refiner_statement: Position report EX-204: net settlement $2,310,000 for 300,000 bbl exchanged, no demurrage line.
inputs.counterparty_statement: Counterparty statement EX-204: net settlement $2,355,000, includes a $45,000 demurrage charge.

expectedOutput.explanation: The $45,000 variance is a demurrage charge present on the counterparty statement but missing from our position report. It recommends reconciling the demurrage line, for human approval before posting.

inputs.refiner_statement: Position report EX-311: two deliveries totalling 180,000 bbl at terminal A for the May cycle.
inputs.counterparty_statement: Counterparty statement EX-311: three deliveries totalling 240,000 bbl at terminal A for the May cycle.

expectedOutput.explanation: The 60,000 bbl variance is a missing line item: the counterparty shows a third delivery our position report does not. It recommends locating the missing ticket and reconciling, for human approval before posting.
